name: Alaska CBPL Construction Contractor License Search

agency.name: Alaska Division of Corporations, Business and Professional Licensing

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the Alaska professional license search and download information before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: construction contractor professional license records exposed by Alaska CBPL search
knownExclusions: The Alaska professional licensing search spans many programs; this source entry is scoped to construction contractor records and related contractor endorsements only.
Business licenses, corporations, local permits, and non-CBPL authorizations are outside this source entry.
Disciplinary action history may require separate official reports or public records requests.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should prefer official license-download paths if their format and terms are confirmed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup and download metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, endorsement, registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The Alaska search site exposes professional license data-download links, but no adapter or redistribution-safe export path has been confirmed.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Alaska CBPL construction contractor licensing. Future work should verify the professional-license download shape and how contractor endorsements should be represented.
maintainerNotes: Keep contractor program scope separate from Alaska business-license and corporation records.
